commands.review_summary:
The PR changes ClawHub skill installs to use a latest install resolver, add GitHub codeload-backed skill archive installs, report install telemetry, and add unit/E2E coverage.

PR surface: Source +350, Tests +254. Total +604 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main runs ClawHub skill installs through installExtractedSkillRoot with policy metadata, while the PR's new helpers omit policy and add unsupported scan fields.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This protected-label PR needs maintainer review after the security findings, dirty merge state, and real behavior proof gap are addressed.

target.title: feat: install GitHub-backed ClawHub skills
target.body:
## Summary

- Resolve ClawHub installs through `/api/v1/skills/:slug/install` when no explicit version is requested.
- Support GitHub-backed install resolutions by downloading the resolved repo commit from GitHub codeload and copying only the resolved skill path into the local skills directory.
- Report authenticated install telemetry to ClawHub after successful installs.
- Add unit and E2E coverage for GitHub-backed ClawHub skill installs.

## Testing

- `bunx vitest run src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/cli/skills-cli.clawhub-install.e2e.test.ts --reporter=dot`

Note: full-repo `tsc --noEmit` OOMed locally, even with an 8GB Node heap, before producing TypeScript diagnostics.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
